{% load i18n %} {# The single HTMX-swappable play region. Every answer/hint post returns it. #} {# Transient flags (celebrated_station, just_correct, just_wrong) come from #} {# the answer view only — a refresh always re-derives plain state from DB. #}
{% if rate_limited %}
⏳ {% trans "Too many attempts. Take a breath and try again in a minute." %}
{% endif %} {% if celebrated_station %} {# --- Station / hunt completed celebration --- #} {# The id is load-bearing: cache-play.js suspends GPS navigation while #} {# this card is on screen (the shell data is stale — progress already #} {# points at the next station), so the Continue link owns the reload. #}
{% include "crush_lu/includes/ghost-logo-animated.html" with class="w-24 h-24" %}
{% if hunt_completed %}

🏁 {% trans "Hunt complete!" %}

{% else %}

{% trans "Station complete!" %}

{% endif %}

+{{ celebrated_points }} {% trans "pts" %}

{% blocktrans with total=progress.total_points %}{{ total }} points in total{% endblocktrans %}

{% if celebrated_station.completion_message %}

{{ celebrated_station.completion_message }}

{% endif %} {% if hunt_completed %} {% trans "See results" %} → {% else %} {% trans "On to the next station" %} → {% endif %}
{% elif progress.is_finished or hunt.status == 'finished' %}
{% include "crush_lu/includes/ghost-logo-animated.html" with class="w-20 h-20" %}

🏁 {% trans "You made it!" %}

{% blocktrans with points=progress.total_points %}Your team finished with {{ points }} points.{% endblocktrans %}

{% trans "See results" %}
{% elif not station %}
{% include "crush_lu/includes/ghost-logo-animated.html" with class="w-16 h-16" %}

{% trans "Waiting for the hunt to start…" %}

{% trans "This page refreshes by itself when the coach opens the course." %}

{% else %} {# --- Expedition header: where you are in the hunt --- #}

{% blocktrans with order=station.order total=station_count %}Station {{ order }} of {{ total }}{% endblocktrans %}

{{ progress.total_points }} {% trans "pts" %}

{{ station.name }}

{% if not attempt.is_unlocked %} {# --- Navigate / unlock state --- #} {% if station.intro_text %}
{{ station.intro_text|linebreaks }}
{% endif %} {% if station.photo %} {% endif %} {% if station.requires_gps and not attempt.arrived_at %}

{% trans "Get to the location to unlock this station." %}

{# Live distance/compass readout — filled in by cache-play.js #}
…

{% trans "to go" %}

{% if hunt.navigation_mode == 'compass' %}
{# iOS only fires orientation events after an explicit user-gesture grant #} {% endif %}

{% trans "Location is blocked. Allow location access for this site in your browser settings, or let a teammate with GPS lead the way." %}
{% trans "Location is unavailable on this device. Ask a teammate to navigate!" %}
{% endif %} {% if station.requires_qr %}
{% if not station.requires_gps or attempt.arrived_at %}

{% trans "Find the QR code and scan it." %}

📷 {% trans "Open scanner" %} {% else %}

{% trans "Reach the location first, then scan the QR code you find there." %}

{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% else %} {# --- Challenge state --- #} {% if just_correct %}
✓ {% trans "Correct!" %} {% if just_correct_message %}{{ just_correct_message }}{% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Challenge progress dots #} {% if challenge_states|length > 1 %}
{% for challenge, ca in challenge_states %} {% blocktrans with num=forloop.counter total=challenge_states|length %}Challenge {{ num }} of {{ total }}{% endblocktrans %} {% if ca and ca.is_correct %}{% trans "(solved)" %}{% elif challenge == current_challenge %}{% trans "(current)" %}{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if current_challenge %}
{{ current_challenge.question|linebreaks }}
{% csrf_token %} {% if current_challenge.challenge_type == 'multiple_choice' and current_challenge.options %}
{% for key, value in current_challenge.options.items %} {% endfor %}
{% elif current_challenge.challenge_type == 'photo_task' %} {% else %} {% endif %}
{% if just_wrong and current_challenge_attempt and not current_challenge_attempt.is_correct %}

{% blocktrans with count=current_challenge_attempt.attempts_count %}Not quite — {{ count }} tries so far. Keep going!{% endblocktrans %}

{% elif current_challenge_attempt and current_challenge_attempt.attempts_count > 0 and not current_challenge_attempt.is_correct %}

{% blocktrans with count=current_challenge_attempt.attempts_count %}{{ count }} tries so far.{% endblocktrans %}

{% endif %} {# --- Hints: two taps, so a stray thumb can't spend points --- #} {% if current_challenge.hint_1 or current_challenge.hint_2 or current_challenge.hint_3 %}

{% trans "Hints (cost points)" %}

{% if current_challenge.hint_1 %} {% if 1 in current_hints_used %}
💡 {{ current_challenge.hint_1 }}
{% else %}
{% blocktrans with cost=current_challenge.hint_1_cost %}Reveal for −{{ cost }} pts?{% endblocktrans %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {% if current_challenge.hint_2 %} {% if 2 in current_hints_used %}
💡 {{ current_challenge.hint_2 }}
{% else %}
{% blocktrans with cost=current_challenge.hint_2_cost %}Reveal for −{{ cost }} pts?{% endblocktrans %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {% if current_challenge.hint_3 %} {% if 3 in current_hints_used %}
💡 {{ current_challenge.hint_3 }}
{% else %}
{% blocktrans with cost=current_challenge.hint_3_cost %}Reveal for −{{ cost }} pts?{% endblocktrans %}
{% endif %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
